issues.title: Incorrect table used
issues.problem: The query is selecting from 'students' table instead of the intended 'sigma_analytics.dim_merchant' or 'sigma_analytics.fact_transactions' tables.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining its purpose or logic.
issues.fix:
-- Select top 5 merchant names
SELECT merchant_name FROM sigma_analytics.dim_merchant LIMIT 5;

issues.title: Inconsistent naming
issues.problem: The alias 'name' is used instead of 'merchant_name' which is the actual column name in the schema.
issues.fix:
-- Select top 5 merchant names
SELECT merchant_name FROM sigma_analytics.dim_merchant LIMIT 5;

review.corrected_sql:
-- Select top 5 merchant names
SELECT merchant_name FROM sigma_analytics.dim_merchant LIMIT 5;
review.summary: The query was using an incorrect table and lacked comments and consistent naming. Fixed the table and added comments for readability.
